## Configuration

### Profiles

| Profile | Database | Kafka | Use Case |
|---------|----------|-------|----------|
| `default` | PostgreSQL localhost | localhost:9092 | Development |
| `test` | H2 in-memory | Embedded Kafka | Unit tests |
| `prod` | PostgreSQL (env vars) | Kafka (env vars) | Production |

### Environment Variables

```bash
# Database
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=saira
DB_USERNAME=saira
DB_PASSWORD=saira

# Kafka
KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS=localhost:9092

# AI Providers (for evaluation & shadow calls)
SPRING_AI_OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
SPRING_AI_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
```

## Development

```bash
# Run tests
mvn test

# Format code
mvn spotless:apply

# Code coverage report
mvn jacoco:report
# Report: target/site/jacoco/index.html

# Build Docker image
docker build -t saira:latest .
```


и убрать

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Java 21+
- Node.js 20+
- Podman or Docker
- Maven 3.9+

### 1. Start infrastructure

```bash
# PostgreSQL + Kafka + Zookeeper
docker-compose up -d postgres kafka
```

### 2. Build & run

```bash
# Full build (backend + frontend)
mvn clean package

# Run application
java -jar target/saira-*.jar

# Or with Maven
mvn spring-boot:run
```

### 3. Development mode

```bash
# Terminal 1: Backend
mvn spring-boot:run -Pskip-frontend

# Terminal 2: Frontend (hot reload, proxy to :8080)
cd frontend && npm run dev
```

Application will be available at `http://localhost:8080`
